training_status: Active; 1 hour daily heavy weights or HIIT
health_conditions: on HRT (estrogen and testosterone pellets, recently stopped testosterone)

benefits.description: Down 5 lbs after a week and a half on combined AOD + 2mg Tirz; some likely water weight
Had trouble eating at all after second dose of Tirz at 2mg

side_effects.description: Significant appetite suppression making it hard to eat enough after 2nd dose of 2mg Tirz; considering dropping to 1mg

protocol_notes: Female, ~50 years old, 5'4", 140 lbs, ~20% BF. Eats 1500-2000 kcal/day, ~150g protein, lower carbs (~100-150g). Takes AOD in morning fasted, injects into fattier areas (arms, inner thighs for spot reduction). Added 2mg Tirz weekly after ~2 months on AOD. Wearing CGM; BG still sitting in upper 90s despite barely eating. Previously tried CJC/IPA with no results. Noted high natural testosterone and IGF-1. A1C typically 5-5.3. On RT with estrogen; recently stopped testosterone pellets.
